授業方法: As the course will provide actual experience of qualitative research via class and requires group work. the course will be conducted Face to Face and must physically attend(No Hybrid mostly) and those entire lectures will not be recorded. Use of Digital devices in the classroom is limited to "Course Material View", "Note Taking" and some which the lecture permit.Time schedule of Sept 25 for Lecture 3, 4, 6, 7 are irregular13:20 - 15:0015:00 - 16:4016:50 - 18:3018:30 - 20:10

トピック.授業計画1:
Lecture 1-2: Course Overview, What is "Insight" (Homework)
Lecture 3, 4, 5, 6: Qualitative research experience, Process to conduct "Qualitative". (Homework)
Lecture 7, 8, 9,10: Test, Practice - qualitative interview(Homework)
Lecture 11-12: Let's experience qualitative interview(Homework)
Lecture 13-14: Report sharing, Guest Speaker(Homework)
トピック.授業外学習2:
Individual (total 30 hours expected)
Collecting necessary information,  review lectures, test preparation, preparation for qualitative interview.   
The class or team (total 15 hours expected)
Preparation of Class/Team work
Preparation for qualitative interview, final report/presentation

参考書/Reference books1: Qualitative Research Methods: Collecting Evidence, Crafting Analysis, Communicating Impact
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
